en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 29 – Jul 5 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 503 kcal/day, peaking 823 on Thursday's double (squats + open water). Sunday (Jul 5) just starting — a planned rest day.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −917 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Sunday (Jul 5) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Thursday doubled up: squats + open water
en.i1: Thursday stacked the squat session (61 min, avg HR 114 / max 153) with a 1.1 km open-water swim in Primošten — 894 active kcal combined, the biggest day of the window.
en.i2t: Four swims kept the aerobic base
en.i2: Two 2.2 km pool interval sets — Monday's 500+8×200 (avg 130 / max 157) and Wednesday's N4×4 (avg 124 / max 162, the week's peak HR) — plus two easy Primošten open-water swims (1.1 km Thu, 1.2 km Fri at avg 98).
en.i3t: Recovery: steady HRV, solid last night
en.i3: RHR held between 52 and 56 across the week and sits at 53 today; HRV is steady at 41, right on its 42 baseline. Last night was a good reset — 6h48 at score 84 off a 23:23 bedtime with deep 1h51 and REM 2h16 — after Friday's short night.
en.i4: Hevy synced this week's tonnage: hack squat 13,740 kg, squats 7,956 kg, and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg — 30,008 kg total across the 3 lifts. Per-set HR peaks weren't appended this run (the connector didn't return per-exercise detail).
en.rec: Sunday is a planned easy/rest day after Saturday's trap-bar deadlift. The week behind: 7 sessions across 6 active days (6h42, ~3,677 active kcal) — three strength lifts (hack squat, squats, trap-bar DL, 30,008 kg total) and four swims (two 2.2 km interval sets plus two easy open-water swims). Recovery is in good shape: RHR eased to 53 and HRV is steady at 41, and last night was a strong 6h48 (score 84) after Friday's short one. Keep today loose — a hike or an easy bike — and go into Monday's swim intervals fresh. Next: Mon swim, Tue hack squat per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-29 → 2026-07-05 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 29.6. – 5.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 503 kcal/dan, vrhunac 823 na četvrtkovom dvostrukom (čučnjevi + otvorena voda). Nedjelja (5.7.) tek počinje — planirani dan odmora.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −917 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Nedjelja (5.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak je spojio trening čučnja (61 min, prosj. puls 114 / maks 153) s plivanjem 1,1 km na otvorenom u Primoštenu — ukupno 894 aktivne kcal, najveći dan prikazanog tjedna.
hr.i2t: Četiri plivanja držala su aerobnu bazu
hr.i2: Dva bazenska intervala od 2,2 km — ponedjeljkov 500+8×200 (prosj. 130 / maks 157) i srijedin N4×4 (prosj. 124 / maks 162, tjedni vrhunac pulsa) — plus dva lagana plivanja u Primoštenu (1,1 km čet, 1,2 km pet uz prosj. 98).
hr.i3: RHR se kroz tjedan kretao između 52 i 56, danas na 53; HRV je stabilan na 41, točno na osnovici 42. Sinoć je bio dobar reset — 6h48 uz ocjenu 84, lijeganje u 23:23, duboki 1h51 i REM 2h16 — nakon petkove kratke noći.
hr.i4: Hevy je sinkronizirao ovotjednu tonažu: hack squat 13.740 kg, čučnjevi 7.956 kg i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg — ukupno 30.008 kg kroz 3 dizanja. Vrhovi pulsa po seriji nisu dodani ovaj put (konektor nije vratio detalj po vježbi).
hr.rec: Nedjelja je planirani lagani/odmorni dan nakon subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja. Tjedan iza: 7 treninga kroz 6 aktivnih dana (6h42, ~3.677 aktivnih kcal) — tri dizanja snage (hack squat, čučnjevi, trap-bar MD, ukupno 30.008 kg) i četiri plivanja (dva intervala 2,2 km plus dva lagana na otvorenom). Oporavak je u dobrom stanju: RHR se spustio na 53 i HRV je stabilan na 41, a sinoć je bilo snažnih 6h48 (ocjena 84) nakon petkove kratke noći. Danas drži labavo — planina ili lagani bicikl — i uđi u ponedjeljkove plivačke intervale svjež. Sljedeće: pon plivanje, uto hack squat po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 29.6. → 5.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
